title: Grocery Store
shortDescription: An Angular-based grocery store web app with user auth, cart management, and admin product controls.
longDescription:
Grocery Store is a full-featured web application built with Angular and a JSON Server backend for local API/data simulation.

The app includes user registration/login, profile and password management, product discovery with search, cart operations, checkout flow, and transaction/success pages.

It also includes admin capabilities such as adding, updating, and deleting products, plus adding admin users.
